title: Concerning Kavin.
content:
When Kavin comes back from the barber,
    Although he no longer is young,
    One cheek is as soft as his heart,
    And the other as smooth as his tongue.
meaning:
"Concerning Kavin." is a quintessential example of Bliss Carman (William)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
